memoryArtifacts.headline: Family of Herbert from Annals and Antiquities, vol. II, pg. 776-777
memoryArtifacts.description: Family of Herbert from Annuals and Antiquities, vol. II, pg. 776-777. However, it is noted, that Herbert of Vermandois (Herbertus Camerarius) was not the Count of Vermandois, but rather his uncle was, Herbert IV, Count of Vermandois. It is also noted that the son of Herbertus Camerarius, Henry FitzHerbert (Henry the Treasurer) is missing from the Annals and Antiquities, but his grandson Herbert (Herbert FitzHenry) and great grandson Herbert  (Herbert FitzHerbert) are included.

memoryArtifacts.headline: Herbert the Chamberlain (Herbertus Camerarius), in A Genealogical and Heraldic History of the Landed Gentry of Great Britain and Ireland, Vol. 1, pg. 613 [but missing the generation of Henry the Treasurer)
memoryArtifacts.description: Herbert the Chamberlain (Herbertus Camerarius), in A Genealogical and Heraldic History of the Landed Gentry of Great Britain and Ireland, Vol. 1, pg. 613 [but missing the generation of Henry the Treasurer). The record skips to the son of Henry, Herbert FitzHenry (Herbert FitzHerbert I, and his son Herbert FitzHerbert (II).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Herbert FitzHerbert於1125年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾時，他的父親Herbert Fitzherbert17歲，母親Sibyl Corbet50歲。他於1151年與Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester在威爾士結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1204年7月17日在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾享年79歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾普斯泰德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Herbert FitzHerbert于1125年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾时，他的父亲Herbert Fitzherbert17岁，母亲Sibyl Corbet50岁。他于1151年与Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester在威尔士结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1204年7月17日在英国威尔斯布雷康史爾享年79岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾普斯泰德。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHerbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Herbert (see Herbert ), ‘son of Herbert’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Herbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. An Old English form, Herebeorht, existed in England before the Conquest, but was superseded by the Norman form, which gave rise to an important surname. The family in question were earls of Pembroke in the 16th and 17th centuries; they included the poet George Herbert . By the end of the Middle Ages Herbert was little used, although it remained a favourite with some families, notably the Saint Quintins of East Yorkshire. Its greater frequency in Britain from the 19th century onwards is due partly to the trend for the revival of medieval names of Germanic origin and partly to the trend for the transferred use of surnames.

variants.name: Heribert
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. An Old English form, Herebeorht, existed in England before the Conquest, but was superseded by the Norman form, which gave rise to an important surname. The family in question were earls of Pembroke in the 16th and 17th centuries; they included the poet George Herbert . By the end of the Middle Ages Herbert was little used, although it remained a favourite with some families, notably the Saint Quintins of East Yorkshire. Its greater frequency in Britain from the 19th century onwards is due partly to the trend for the revival of medieval names of Germanic origin and partly to the trend for the transferred use of surnames.

en.lifeSummary: When Herbert FitzHerbert was born in 1125, in Breconshire, Wales, his father, Herbert Fitzherbert, was 17 and his mother, Sibyl Corbet, was 50. He married Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester in 1151, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 17 July 1204, in Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 79, and was buried in Hempsted, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Herbert FitzHerbert est né en 1125, à Breconshire, Galles, son père, Herbert Fitzherbert, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Sibyl Corbet, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester en 1151, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 17 juillet 1204, à Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Hempsted, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Herbert FitzHerbert 1125 in Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Herbert Fitzherbert 17 und seine Mutter Sibyl Corbet 50. Er hat 1151 in Wales Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 17. Juli 1204 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Hempsted, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester nel 1151, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 17 luglio 1204, nel Breconshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolto a Hempsted, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Herbert FitzHerbertが1125年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Herbert Fitzherbertは17歳，母Sibyl Corbetは50歳であった。1151年にウェールズでLucy FitzMiles of Gloucesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1204年7月17日にイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアで79歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアヘンプステドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Herbert FitzHerbert(이)가 1125년 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Herbert Fitzherbert(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibyl Corbet(은)는 50세였다. 그는 1151년 웨일스에서 Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1204년 7월 17일 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 헤프스테드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Herbert FitzHerbert nasceu em 1125, em Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Herbert Fitzherbert, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl Corbet, tinha 50 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester em 1151, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 17 de julho de 1204, em Breconshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em Hempsted, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Herbert FitzHerbert родился в 1125 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Herbert Fitzherbert было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibyl Corbet, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester в 1151 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 17 июля 1204 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности хемпстед, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Herbert FitzHerbert nació en 1125, en Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Herbert Fitzherbert, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Sibyl Corbet, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester en 1151, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 17 de julio de 1204, en Breconshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultado en Hempsted, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
